title: Mark
description: An abstract base type for marked inline content.
$comment:
This is an abstract base type used in Stencila Schema for inline marked content.

It exists to group inline nodes that wrap other inline content with semantic
markup such as emphasis, quotes, annotations, or editorial marks. This allows
shared handling of nested inline content and common metadata while keeping
specific mark semantics in derived types.

Key properties usually include wrapped `content`, together with inherited
metadata and provenance features from [`Entity`](./entity.md).

analogues.name: HTML phrasing elements
analogues.notes: Broadly analogous to inline wrapper elements such as `<em>`, `<strong>`, or `<q>`, though Stencila abstracts over many specific mark types.
Approximate Pandoc analogue because concrete mark types are individual inline constructors rather than subclasses of an abstract mark base type.

type.$comment: This is a special property analogous to JSON-LD's `@type` keyword.

id.$comment: This is a special property analogous to JSON-LD's `@id` keyword.

min.description: Generate a single fixed text value.

low.description: Generate a single arbitrary, non-recursive, inline node

high.description: Generate up to two arbitrary, non-recursive, inline nodes

max.description: Generate up to four arbitrary, non-recursive, inline nodes
